Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Page is missing h1 heading</p> <div class="element"><body class="runtime-cid-2825 runtime-ctid-134 runtime-aid-3142 runtime-atid-9 default site-1"><div id="cookie-information-template-wrapper" style="display: block;"><style nonce="">/** Template na</div> <div class="fix">Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>iframe is missing title attribute</p> <div class="element"><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MG7FJ59" style="display:none; visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive title attribute to iframe</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>iframe is missing title attribute</p> <div class="element"><iframe aria-hidden="true" frameborder="0" style="z-index: -1; position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; opacity: 0;" tabindex="-1"></iframe></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive title attribute to iframe</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>iframe is missing title attribute</p> <div class="element"><iframe height="60" id="ctstatistics-noscript-iframe" src="https://www.varanger-kraft.no/regstat.php/2026-02-06/?l=no_NO&i=1&h=www.varanger-kraft.no&q=200&n=html&o=42590-61491-3980</div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive title attribute to iframe</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/privacy/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personvern</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Element has empty aria-label</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/privacy/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personvern</a></div> <div class="fix">Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="footer"> <p>Testreglene er basert på <a href="https://www.uutilsynet.no/regelverk/oversikt-over-testregler-nettsteder/709" target="_blank">UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler</a></p> </div> <div class="modal-overlay" id="rescanModal"> <div class="modal"> <h3>🔄 Start ny skanning</h3> <div class="modal-url">https://www.varanger-kraft.no</div> <div class="modal-pages"> <label>Antall sider:</label> <input type="number" id="maxPages" value="22" min="1" max="500" onchange="updateCommand()"> <span class="modal-pages-hint">1-500</span> </div> <p style="font-size:13px;color:#666;margin:0 0 8px">Kopier kommandoen:</p> <div class="modal-command" id="rescanCommand">python checker.py https://www.varanger-kraft.no --max-pages 22 --format html</div> <div class="modal-actions"> <button class="modal-btn secondary" onclick="closeRescanModal()">Lukk</button> <button class="modal-btn primary" onclick="copyCommand()">📋 Kopier</button> </div> </div> </div> </body> </html>
